horoscope: You've just begun a Mercury cycle that's good for working with your natural talents and putting them to practical use, dear Aries. When stressed, there may be worry or overstimulation about money, possessions, and resources in the weeks ahead. For the most part, however, you can come up with some great business ideas and focus on your practical affairs during this useful cycle. You tend to be quick to get to the point or the bottom line in your conversations now. It may be a time to pad your income through communications, networking, sharing, and word of mouth. It's one of the best periods of the year for money-making ideas. Today, however, the Moon heads into your spirit sector, and you find it easy to latch onto something special or inspirational. It's a strong time for relations with friends, or you may be feeling particularly confident about your plans and projects. You are received well today and admired for your personal style. You more readily access your more spontaneous side. Making small changes to your routine can be emotionally refreshing.

You've begun a Mercury cycle that brings more clarity to your life after a period of relative reflection and perhaps some indecision, dear Taurus. You may jump off the fence about a matter or reach a significant conclusion. You're ready to put the past behind you, and you have plenty of fresh ideas for the future. You may very well delight others with your communications. However, the Moon enters your private solar eighth house today, where it will visit for over two days, and there's a retiring quality to your nature. Still, enthusiasm seems in wonderful supply today, and you can take pleasure from setting goals for yourself and basking in a confident feeling that you'll reach them in due time.

In the new Mercury cycle, you may be a little more secretive or indecisive, dear Gemini, but you might also appreciate this as a time for increased mental rest. You're looking at things in a new way and gaining a valuable perspective. This transit will continue until the 17th, and it's a fine time for introspection. Today, however, the Moon heads into your social seventh house for a stay of just over two days. It's a good day for feeling supported by others, and for returning the favor. Transits especially support conversations, learning, communicating, and studying. This area of your solar chart spotlights your relationships with others, as well as those who negotiate with you or accommodate you in your life. People are kinder and more thoughtful with you than usual. Matters related to team efforts, business income, publishing, promotion, and education are favored for you right now.

With Mercury now transiting your solar eleventh house, dear Cancer, you're generally more inclined to mentally focus on dreams, wishes, hopes, and happiness goals, and you're largely more interested in what others are doing, saying, and thinking. You're thinking more about the group, community, or friendships and networking. Remote rapport with associates, friends, and networks is easier. As friendly as this cycle is, today's transits are strong for dealing with details and tying up loose ends. You're taking a progressive and practical approach, which is strong for productivity. With the Moon's move into your solar sixth house, you don't need to be the center of attention right now, as this would take away from what you want to get done. Try to tame the tendency to spend too much time on little problems whose solutions won't end up benefiting you enough to justify the time spent on them. Getting chores and duties out of your way makes the most sense now so that you can dive into a project or relationship guilt-free later.

You're starting a cycle that's good for spreading the word and promoting your work or services, dear Leo, as well as for communicating, planning, and sorting out important goals and projects. Your thinking is goal-oriented. Your words are also more impactful, and it makes sense to spend a little more time than usual crafting what you want to say and present to the world. Today, however, the Moon heads into your sector of play, romance, and creativity, and your social life or leisure activities are on the front burner. It's a good time to collaborate and share ideas and beliefs. You might bond with someone as you make a greater attempt to understand one another. Letting loose your more expressive, playful, or creative side comes readily. Your head and your heart are working in harmony, and you might make connections you wouldn't typically make. You're presenting yourself with strength and commitment today, but not in an intimidating way, as your sense of fun is with you in equal measure.

You're beginning a cycle for seeking to understand more about your life and the world around you, dear Virgo. You might enjoy being a source of inspiration as well. You are putting recent events and ideas into perspective rather than into compartments during this cycle. It's a great time for big ideas that come from thinking in broad terms, but not necessarily reliable for their practical implementation -- that comes at a later date! There can be ideas, travel, or connections that expand your mind during this cycle. Today, your focus is more practical, however. You can get things done around the home or accomplish something worthwhile with family now, or this is a day to stop and smell the roses and center yourself. Your emotional focus is on security and safety, and this makes familiar activities quite appealing. You tend to look within or to your support system for what you need today.

You've just begun a cycle for extra attention to doing research and investigation, dear Libra. It's a fine period for intimate communications. Mercury's more difficult moments in this sector might incline you to over-analyze or read between the lines to your detriment at times. Still, for the most part, it's a valuable time for gathering information. You're likely to crave greater passion in your projects and communications. Today's energies are more breezy, however. It can be a good day to take a break from overthinking and analyzing. Early today, the Moon moves into your communications sector, and you might bridge gaps with others through thoughtful gestures that tell people they are meaningful to you. Your senses are stirring, and certain ideas and plans can energize you.

You're just starting a cycle for having the upper hand in negotiations, dear Scorpio, but the key is not to score intellectual points right now. Instead, your ability to consider the other side of the coin strengthens, not only helping you endear yourself to others but also allowing for a whole new perspective. More one-on-one conversations are appealing. Today, however, you feel rather self-contained. You're steady emotionally with the Moon's move into your solar second house, and the focus is on what you can do. Activities that involve building toward your goals are most satisfying right now. Today's Moon encourages a focus on practical and sensual needs, but there is also a pleasing energy of cooperation surrounding your interactions. Family, work, and health matters tend to thrive today.

Small jobs and duties are in stronger focus in the new Mercury cycle you're starting now, dear Sagittarius. It's an exceptional time to tidy up your life in significant ways, but it's vital to avoid overthinking and worrying, which can come a little too easily under duress while this cycle is active. You're likely to discover useful information about work and health methods and learn new and improved ways of reorganizing your life in the weeks ahead. Today, however, the Moon moves into your sign for a couple of days, and you become quite interested in interacting and connecting. Transits today encourage a pleasant, fresh outlook and a sense of general support and positivity. You are a little braver than usual, particularly for entertaining new concepts and ideas, expressing your feelings or opinions, and believing in someone or something. You can be very pleased with your current interests and projects.

In the new Mercury cycle, dear Capricorn, you may get the chance to shine or stand out on a mental level, or it can be a time of clearer expression of your feelings, ideas, and personality. You're in a good position to move fun projects and pursuits forward and to bring a little more creativity or imagination to whatever you do in the weeks ahead. However, early today, the Moon heads into your privacy sector, encouraging you to make room for more rest and time for reflection, which can be emotionally cleansing. Private and emotional matters are in focus and tend to thrive. Your intuition is exceptionally strong, and you may get closer to someone or gain a deeper understanding of a situation today.

You've just begun a cycle that's strong for remembering old methods that worked for you that you might now revive, dear Aquarius. While this is not the most expressive or communicative period, it's a good time to sort out problems around the home and open up the lines of communication with loved ones. With more objectivity applied to your personal and family affairs, your choices and decisions tend to be a little more well-rounded than usual. It can be a time of evaluating your inner feelings, values, and connections, or of assessing and negotiating in your domestic life. Today, you present yourself with confidence and positivity, and you're received well in turn. The Moon heads into your social sector early today, encouraging more lighthearted connections and conversations. There is something in the way you meet the world that is very appealing and that draws people to you.

Mercury has just begun its transit of your solar third house, dear Pisces, and intellectual companionship becomes more important than usual to you in the weeks ahead. You can benefit from doing some information gathering. This transit gives your mental outlook a nice little boost, and it can also bring interesting projects into your life. Today, you might make some interesting connections as you pursue your goals. A feeling that others are either cooperating or letting you do your thing helps you to be especially productive. In turn, you are giving others the benefit of the doubt. Confidence in your worth and value can attract positive attention, and perhaps even a bonus or recognition. This is a time for getting work done and handling your responsibilities, and you're likely to find yourself in the best shape possible given the day's energy if you pace yourself and attend to your duties first.
